caption:
Imagine a summer evening at Battery City Park in New York, where the sky is a mesmerizing blue hue—the perfect backdrop for a game of volleyball. Laughter fills the air as friends come together for some fun in the sun, the sound of the ball echoing against the city skyline 🌆

 captured on iPhone 13 Pro
4k at 30fps 
summer in new york
